---
title: "Page not found"
page-layout: full
---

::: {style="text-align: center; padding: 3rem 1rem;"}

The page you went looking for does not exist.

![Animation by Emmie Wahlström](images/jonas-walk.GIF){.center-cropped}

[Back to Home](index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary style="margin-top: 1.5rem;"}

:::

<style>
    .center-cropped {
        width: 20%;
        object-fit: contain;
        object-position: center;
        margin: 2rem auto;
        display: block;
        border-radius: 8px;
    }
</style>
